film.title: Ek Paheli Leela
film.overview: It is a reincarnation story about the love between Leela and her lover, which is left incomplete because one of them has been murdered. The story comes to circle after 300 years; when Leela has taken birth as Meera and her lover's character is also reborn.

dialogues.dialogue: You never stop me. You don't care for me. Stupid girl, aren't you ashamed. Those who feel ashamed, curse their fate. If I had felt ashamed, I wouldn't have fallen in love.

You don't care for me. Stupid girl, aren't you ashamed. Those who feel ashamed, curse their fate. If I had felt ashamed, I wouldn't have fallen in love. And since I'm in love, there's bound to be fire.

Stupid girl, aren't you ashamed. Those who feel ashamed, curse their fate. If I had felt ashamed, I wouldn't have fallen in love. And since I'm in love, there's bound to be fire. Take my hand, marry me.

It's the difference in our thoughts. For him, respect is something to be taken....and I believe it should be given. He feels proud in displaying his strength....while I like being sober. I know, because you believe in love and affection. I always believed in love....but now I've an unwavering faith.
